ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for automated alerts when stock levels fall below this level */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time required to restock the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product for shipping purposes */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x10x5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of returns (e.g., pending, approved, refunded) */,
  "exchange_status" TEXT /* Status of exchanges (e.g., pending, approved, completed) */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the customer */,
  "admin_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product added or removed from inventory */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the quantity was added */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order, if applicable */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the inventory record */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the inventory change occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change (e.g., initial stock, return, damage) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the inventory change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
